title: DESI Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument - Public Data
content: The DESI public data server (data.desi.lbl.gov) returned 503 Service Temporarily Unavailable. DESI has released Early Data Release (EDR) and DR1 containing millions of galaxy spectra for baryon acoustic oscillation measurements. Check https://data.desi.lbl.gov/public/ when service resumes.
